_note: schema v3 — readiness-flow (no stages, no streams, tags instead). See $GDRIVE/Shared/ecosystem/STATUS.md for semantics.

tasks.title: EmergentEventProposer: SCP designations leaking into participants
acceptance_criteria: EmergentEventProposer.SYSTEM_PROMPT explicitly forbids SCP-XXX / anomalies / deities as participant IDs
Prompt includes one correct-usage in-context example showing SCP referenced inside `narrative` instead
validate_fail / calls ratio drops below 10% across a 12-tick smoke run with all three packs
tasks.description: 30-tick validation found ~42% of emergent proposals rejected because the LLM put 'scp-035' into participants. SCPs are anomalies, not agents. Cheapest fix is prompt clarification + example; escalate to pseudo-agent records if rate stays high.
tasks.effort: 5 min for prompt fix, up to 1 day for pseudo-agent option

tasks.title: Dashboard component tests (jsdom + vitest)
acceptance_criteria: @solidjs/testing-library + jsdom wired into the dashboard package
TopBar test asserts the diversity pill renders given a recentEvents list
SocialPanel test asserts components + isolated rows render given /api/social_graph payload
make check runs the new tests as part of ts-dashboard
tasks.description: After Phase 3, client-side compute paths (TopBar diversity, SocialPanel) work but have no automated render test. Closes the last coverage gap surfaced by the 2026-04-26 audit. API integration coverage already landed in tests/test_api_integration.py (19 tests).

tasks.title: agents/__init__.py public facade
acceptance_criteria: living_world/agents/__init__.py re-exports the 10 public agent classes
All consumer modules switched to `from living_world.agents import X` style
tasks.description: Renaming or splitting any agent module currently breaks every consumer. Populate the package facade with re-exports of: Narrator, AgentPlanner, AgentSelfUpdate, EmergentEventProposer, Chronicler, DialogueGenerator, ConsciousnessLayer, SubjectivePerception, LLMMoveAdvisor, MemoryReflector.

tasks.title: In-repo design docs (architecture.md + ADRs)
acceptance_criteria: docs/architecture.md describes the 3-layer T-shape (Python sim · Rust shell · TS UI) + 13-phase tick pipeline
docs/adr/ contains at least three ADRs: tier separation, conscience-as-system-2, chronicler non-interventionism
README.md links to docs/architecture.md and docs/HISTORY.md
tasks.description: Phase 3 audit confirmed the three-layer architecture is stable; document it before more contributors land. HISTORY.md exists already; this task fills in the architecture overview + key ADRs.

tasks.title: Cross-pack bridge — migration event templates per pack
acceptance_criteria: Each loaded pack contributes one migration event template (e.g. scp:portal-anomaly, liaozhai:dream-passage, cthulhu:gate-of-yog-sothoth)
12-tick smoke run with 2+ packs produces at least one cross-pack interaction (agent from pack A appears in tile owned by pack B)
agent.pack_origin is preserved across migration so persona voice is anchored
tasks.description: Foundation already exists: when ≥2 packs are loaded, world.py creates a shared `liminal` tile any pack can place agents in. Missing: the migration event templates that move agents through it.

tasks.title: Player prompt injection MVP
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/inject_event accepts {prompt: string} and produces an EventProposal at the next tick
Conscience layer still gets to APPROVE / ADJUST / VETO the player-injected proposal
Dashboard textbox in the bottom card with 'inject' button
tasks.description: Today the sim is autonomous-only. Add a single natural-language textbox the user can use to nudge the world. LLM converts intent → EventProposal, reuses ~80% of emergent.propose machinery. Power-user form path is a follow-up.

tasks.title: Long-run resumability + timeline diff (deterministic seed-derive)
acceptance_criteria: Every random call site reads from derive_rng(seed, t, key) instead of self.rng
engine.run(N) from a snapshot + same seed = byte-identical state to a fresh N-tick run (assert in invariants test)
lw diff snapshotA snapshotB prints death deltas, chapter divergence, top-3 emergent kinds that differ
tasks.description: Today snapshots persist every 7 ticks but resume is not byte-deterministic. Replace global self.rng with pure functional derive_rng(seed, t, key). Cost is concentrated in finding + converting every self.rng.* call site (movement, resolver, interactions, storyteller).

tasks.title: Multi-seed batch runs CLI + nightly diversity report
acceptance_criteria: lw batch --seeds 10 --ticks 50 produces a JSON report with per-kind frequency across runs
report identifies cliché chapter titles (>=3/10 runs), universal vs rare event_kinds
agent-survival distribution recorded (variance proxy)
tasks.description: reports/diversity.py exists as a Marimo notebook but isn't wired into the CLI or CI. This task gives it a stable CLI surface so nightly CI can flag diversity regressions.

tasks.title: [Park, optional] Daily plan layer
acceptance_criteria: Planner emits day → hour → action plans in addition to weekly intentions
tasks.description: Park 2023 decomposes weekly into day/hour/action. Only worth doing once daily emergent gameplay gets richer. Marked optional.

tasks.title: [AgentSociety, optional] Public goods / collective action events
acceptance_criteria: Group decisions (vote, mutual defense, resource pooling) modelled as a new event_kind family
tasks.description: Only payoff once cross-pack bridge (#7) lands. Marked optional, blocked by L-07.

_status_legend.ready: may be picked up next; criteria + files are concrete
_status_legend.blocked: waiting on a dep listed in blocked_by
_status_legend.later: deliberately deferred; revisit when noted trigger fires
_status_legend.active: someone is working on it right now
